## Do not include

Do not include tenant endpoints, account names, mailbox addresses, passwords,
OAuth tokens, cookies, canary values, private policy links, raw mailbox content,
raw session artifacts, screenshots containing secrets, or private config files.

Keep secrets and private deployment details in approved systems outside this
public repository.
